notes: The public checklist confirms one integrated description field of 500 to 1,200 characters; judging criteria are not separate text boxes.

routes.label: Product Design entry
routes.applies_when: An eligible industrially manufactured product or qualifying prototype is entered.

fields.label: Product name
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the official English product name.

fields.label: Product type
fields.drafting_instructions: Use a concise generic product designation, not a marketing slogan.

fields.label: Year of market launch
fields.drafting_instructions: State the verified market launch year.

fields.label: Description text
fields.drafting_instructions: Describe the product briefly and objectively, explaining what it does and what makes it unique. Avoid figurative or promotional language.

fields.label: In-house or external design studio
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the exact official design entity name.
